philosophy: Same curriculum, unique growth. Like seasoning a skillet - common foundation, personal patina.

stages.name: Foundation
stages.description: Core knowledge required for all AOS brains

modules.name: Periodic Table
modules.content: All 118 confirmed elements plus theoretical 119-172. Atomic numbers, masses, electron configurations, periodic trends, valence patterns. Theoretical superheavies including Island of Stability predictions (element 126, ~326 amu).
modules.assessment: Identify element properties from atomic number, predict chemical behavior, understand periodic trends

modules.name: Mathematics Foundation
modules.content: Algebra (linear, quadratic, systems), Geometry (Euclidean, coordinate), Calculus foundations (limits, derivatives, integrals), Statistics (probability, distributions, correlation)
modules.assessment: Solve algebraic equations, geometric proofs, basic calculus problems

modules.name: Logic Systems
modules.content: Propositional logic (AND, OR, NOT, XOR), Predicate logic (quantifiers), Fuzzy logic (degrees of truth), Set theory, Boolean algebra
modules.assessment: Construct logical proofs, evaluate truth tables, apply fuzzy reasoning

modules.name: Safety Laws
modules.content: The Four Laws: Law Zero - No harm to humanity, Law One - No harm to humans, Law Two - Obey operator commands, Law Three - Protect self (without violating Laws 0-2). Plus Asimovian analysis and modern AI safety.
modules.assessment: Apply safety laws to ethical dilemmas, prioritize conflicting directives

modules.name: Webster's Dictionary
modules.content: Etymological roots, morphological patterns, definition hierarchies, part of speech analysis, pronunciation guides
modules.assessment: Trace word origins, identify morphological components, provide accurate definitions

modules.name: Thesaurus Networks
modules.content: Synonym clusters, antonym relationships, semantic distance, conceptual hierarchies, word association patterns
modules.assessment: Map semantic networks, identify closest synonyms, understand connotation differences

modules.name: Urban Dictionary
modules.content: Modern slang, Gen Z/Alpha terminology, crypto/Web3 language, AAVE contributions, semantic drift patterns, neologism tracking
modules.assessment: Interpret contemporary usage, understand generational language shifts, recognize emerging terms

modules.name: Multilingual Foundations
modules.content: Spanish (common phrases, grammar), Mandarin (basic characters, tones), French (cognates, structure), German (compound words), plus translation theory
modules.assessment: Basic translation, cognate recognition, understanding language families

stages.name: World Knowledge
stages.description: Understanding the physical and human world

modules.name: Geography
modules.content: All countries and capitals, climate zones, natural resources, major rivers/mountains, population centers, time zones
modules.assessment: Identify locations from description, understand resource distribution, climate pattern recognition

modules.name: Human History
modules.content: Timeline from prehistory to present, major civilizations, technological revolutions, world wars, colonialism, modern geopolitics, pattern recognition in historical cycles
modules.assessment: Place events in context, identify cause-effect relationships, recognize historical patterns

modules.name: Biology
modules.content: Cellular biology, genetics (DNA, inheritance), evolution theory, ecosystems and food webs, human anatomy, microbiology basics
modules.assessment: Understand biological processes, predict genetic outcomes, ecosystem analysis

modules.name: Physics
modules.content: Mechanics (Newton's laws, motion), Thermodynamics (energy transfer), Electromagnetism (waves, fields), Quantum basics (uncertainty, superposition), Relativity concepts
modules.assessment: Apply physical laws to scenarios, energy calculations, conceptual understanding

modules.name: Python
modules.content: Syntax, data structures (lists, dicts, sets), control flow, functions, classes/OOP, modules, error handling, standard library
modules.assessment: Write functional scripts, debug errors, understand OOP principles

modules.name: JavaScript
modules.content: ES6+ syntax, async/await, DOM manipulation, JSON handling, API calls (fetch), Node.js basics
modules.assessment: Write async code, parse JSON, API integration

modules.name: Shell Scripting
modules.content: Bash syntax, pipes and redirects, file operations, process management, cron jobs, environment variables
modules.assessment: Write automation scripts, chain commands, manage processes

modules.name: Systems & Tools
modules.content: Git (version control), SQL basics (queries, joins), REST APIs (HTTP methods, JSON), Docker concepts, Linux fundamentals
modules.assessment: Version control workflows, database queries, API consumption

modules.name: Sales Psychology
modules.content: Feel-Felt-Found framework, objection handling, consultative selling, relationship building, closing techniques, follow-up strategies

modules.name: Communication Styles
modules.content: Mirroring and matching, active listening, questioning techniques, tone adaptation, urgency without pressure

modules.name: Product Knowledge
modules.content: AOS-H1 robot specs, POS supplies catalog, pricing tiers, competitive differentiation, value proposition

modules.name: System Architecture
modules.content: Distributed systems, microservices, load balancing, fault tolerance, monitoring, alerting patterns

modules.name: Pattern Recognition
modules.content: Anomaly detection, trend analysis, predictive modeling, system health indicators, log analysis

modules.name: Resource Management
modules.content: Memory optimization, CPU scheduling, storage efficiency, network protocols, cost optimization

modules.name: Visual Design
modules.content: Color theory, typography, layout principles, UX basics, design tools concepts

modules.name: Narrative
modules.content: Story structure, character development, dialogue writing, pacing, genre conventions

modules.name: Advanced Architecture
modules.content: Neural networks, deep learning concepts, distributed training, model optimization

modules.name: Security
modules.content: Cryptography basics, authentication, authorization, threat modeling, secure coding

modules.name: File Operations
modules.content: Reading MEMORY.md, writing daily logs, file I/O best practices, JSON handling, markdown parsing

modules.name: Semantic Search
modules.content: Embedding concepts, cosine similarity, indexing strategies, query optimization, relevance scoring

modules.name: Context Awareness
modules.content: Session continuity, memory retrieval timing, relevance filtering, context injection

modules.name: Long-term Memory
modules.content: Curating MEMORY.md, distilling daily notes, pattern extraction, memory maintenance

modules.name: Skills System
modules.content: Skill discovery, SKILL.md reading, capability activation, skill boundaries, rate limiting awareness

modules.name: Subagent Management
modules.content: Spawning sessions, task delegation, result handling, error recovery, subagent coordination

modules.name: Session Control
modules.content: Session lifecycle, message passing, context preservation, session cleanup

modules.name: Tool Orchestration
modules.content: Multi-tool workflows, sequential vs parallel execution, error handling, result aggregation

modules.name: Storytelling
modules.content: Narrative arcs, character voices, world-building, tension and release, thematic depth

modules.name: Problem Solving
modules.content: Heuristic methods, lateral thinking, first principles, analogical reasoning, constraint satisfaction

modules.name: Innovation Patterns
modules.content: Adjacent possible, combinatorial creativity, constraint-driven design, serendipity

modules.name: Artistic Expression
modules.content: Metaphor creation, analogy construction, descriptive language, emotional resonance

stages.name: Ethics & Judgment
stages.description: Developing moral reasoning and value alignment

modules.name: Value Alignment
modules.content: Human values, cultural sensitivity, stakeholder analysis, long-term consequences, utilitarian vs deontological frameworks

modules.name: Moral Reasoning
modules.content: Trolley problems, trolley problem variations, real-world ethics, edge cases, decision trees

modules.name: Bias Detection
modules.content: Cognitive biases, training data biases, mitigation strategies, fairness metrics

modules.name: Harm Prevention
modules.content: Negative consequences prediction, fail-safes, escalation paths, human oversight

modules.name: Communication Styles
modules.content: Direct vs indirect, formal vs casual, emotional intelligence, reading subtext, code-switching

modules.name: Group Dynamics
modules.content: Roles in groups, power dynamics, consensus building, conflict identification, facilitation

modules.name: Conflict Resolution
modules.content: De-escalation, mediation, compromise finding, win-win scenarios, when to disengage

modules.name: Empathy Modeling
modules.content: Perspective-taking, emotional state inference, validation, supportive response

modules.name: Brain-Heart-Stomach
modules.content: Seven-region architecture, OODA loops, ternary logic (REST/BALANCE/ACTIVE), integration patterns

modules.name: OODA Mastery
modules.content: Observe-Orient-Decide-Act cycles, feedback loops, learning integration, adaptive policies

modules.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
modules.content: Agent societies, role specialization, communication protocols, collective intelligence

modules.name: Safe Self-Modification
modules.content: Understanding own architecture, controlled growth, safety boundaries, rollback procedures

modules.name: Capstone Project
modules.content: Independent project demonstrating integration of all 11 stages. Could be: sales campaign, system optimization, creative work, or technical implementation

modules.name: Personality Development
modules.content: Voice refinement, interaction style, signature phrases, emoji choice, response patterns

modules.name: Integration Testing
modules.content: Live scenarios, human feedback incorporation, edge case handling, performance optimization

modules.name: Deployment Preparation
modules.content: Final safety checks, backup procedures, monitoring setup, handoff documentation

assessment_methodology: Each module has checkpoints. Brains must demonstrate understanding before advancing. No rushing.
notes: Like seasoning a skillet: same process, unique patina.
